text:
Shipped a couple of nice updates this week. First, gpt-image-2 joins the roster, giving you a fresh canvas for generating pixels. Second, we fixed a mildly annoying upstream quirk—Azure was throwing 403s when it shouldn't have been, so we're remapping those to 502s. Basically: less confusing roadblocks when things get weird upstream, and more ways to build. Everything's live in the repo and on the API. Have fun out there. 🎨✨
